overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at night. The character navigates past pedestrians, construction barriers, and crosses a wet intersection surrounded by towering digital billboards and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with metal security fencing

events.description: character transitions from standing to walking forward along the sidewalk
approaching construction zone with road closed barriers becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, passing by various NPC pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket with white symbol walking in same direction ahead of ego
pedestrian walking past ego in opposite direction

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying 'REAL WATER' text on building facade
tall black metal security fence running parallel to the sidewalk
tall skyscraper covered with vertical neon advertisements and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet downtown sidewalk at night, passing the illuminated 'REAL WATER' billboard on the left while a metal fence runs along the right. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions as neon signs glow atop distant skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction zone with road closed barriers

events.description: entering construction barrier zone with red and white road closed signs on the right
aggressive NPC on left raises arms and gestures toward the character

agents.ego_description: navigating past construction barriers and aggressive pedestrians while approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: hostile pedestrian with raised arms gesturing aggressively toward ego
pedestrian in beige outfit walking alongside ego

entered.detail: red and white striped plastic barriers with 'ROAD CLOSED' text illuminated by red lights
yellow and black striped metal construction fencing with concrete bases
pile of black and blue garbage bags accumulated on sidewalk near intersection

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrowed construction zone lined with red 'ROAD CLOSED' barriers and yellow construction fencing on the right. An aggressive NPC gestures from the left as the character approaches a large intersection with trash bags piled near the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with massive digital billboards

events.description: character stops at street corner to wait and observe traffic before crossing
character begins crossing the wet intersection, navigating around the yellow curb median

agents.ego_description: waiting at the street corner observing passing vehicles, then crossing the wet intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing at corner wearing dark vest with pink sleeves, facing the street
dark colored car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive illuminated red billboard displaying advertisement on building facade
wet asphalt street with yellow painted curb and crosswalk markings
cluster of large digital screens on surrounding buildings showing various advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character waits at a wide urban intersection corner dominated by a massive red billboard and numerous digital screens. After observing the moderate traffic, the character crosses the wet asphalt street, navigating around the yellow curb while neon lights reflect off the rain-slicked pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit downtown district that transitions from a wide sidewalk into a cramped construction zone and finally across a sprawling urban intersection. It begins with the character walking along a wet pavement past an illuminated REAL WATER billboard and a metal fence, with distant skyscrapers glowing against the night sky. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into a construction zone lined with red ROAD CLOSED barriers and yellow fencing, where an aggressive NPC gestures from the side near piles of trash bags. The camera then opens up to a wide intersection dominated by a massive red billboard and numerous digital screens. Finally, the character navigates around a yellow curb to cross the rain-slicked asphalt, with the surrounding neon lights reflecting vividly off the wet street.
